summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Open hydrated PRs are kept independently for maintainer review; refs with unavailable live state are scoped needs_human because target kind/state/updated_at were not hydrated.
